predicate_mappings.case_specialty: {} is related to the clinical specialty {}
predicate_mappings.case_department: {} is associated with the clinical department {}

intake_activate_case.description: activate an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only activate an adverse event case A if it is not the case that A is active and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I activate an adverse event case A, it is the case that A is active

assign_investigator.description: assign an investigator B to an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only assign an investigator B to an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
I can only assign an investigator B to an adverse event case A if it is not the case that A is assigned
effects: Once I assign an investigator B to an adverse event case A, it is the case that A is assigned to investigator B and A is assigned
Once I assign an investigator B to an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_investigator.description: release an investigator B from an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only release an investigator B from an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is assigned to investigator B
I can only release an investigator B from an adverse event case A if it is not the case that the panel review for A is completed and it is not the case that authorization for A is granted
effects: Once I release an investigator B from an adverse event case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I release an investigator B from an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to investigator B and it is not the case anymore that A is assigned and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for collection and it is not the case anymore that A collection is completed and it is not the case anymore that A is pending remediation and it is not the case anymore that A has been approved for remediation and it is not the case anymore that the case A requires a follow up review

reserve_evidence_kit.description: reserve an evidence kit B for an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an evidence kit B for an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available
effects: Once I reserve an evidence kit B for an adverse event case A, it is the case that the evidence kit B is allocated to the case A
Once I reserve an evidence kit B for an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_evidence_kit.description: release an evidence kit B from an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only release an evidence kit B from an adverse event case A if it is the case that the evidence kit B is allocated to the case A
effects: Once I release an evidence kit B from an adverse event case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an evidence kit B from an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that the evidence kit B is allocated to the case A

authorize_collection.description: authorize collection for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B
preconditions: I can only authorize collection for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B if it is the case that A is active and A is assigned and the evidence kit B is allocated to the case A
I can only authorize collection for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B if it is not the case that A is ready for collection
effects: Once I authorize collection for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B, it is the case that A is ready for collection

trigger_notification_channel.description: trigger a notification channel B for an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only trigger a notification channel B for an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is active and A is assigned and B is available
I can only trigger a notification channel B for an adverse event case A if it is not the case that A is ready for collection
effects: Once I trigger a notification channel B for an adverse event case A, it is the case that A is ready for collection and A is pending remediation
Once I trigger a notification channel B for an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

technician_collect_evidence.description: collect evidence for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B by a collection technician C
preconditions: I can only collect evidence for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B by a collection technician C if it is the case that A is ready for collection and A is assigned and the evidence kit B is allocated to the case A and C is available
I can only collect evidence for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B by a collection technician C if it is not the case that A collection is completed
effects: Once I collect evidence for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B by a collection technician C, it is the case that A collection is completed
Once I collect evidence for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B by a collection technician C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending remediation

authorize_report_via_template.description: authorize report for an adverse event case A using a report template B
preconditions: I can only authorize report for an adverse event case A using a report template B if it is the case that A is assigned and the case report for A is authorized with B
I can only authorize report for an adverse event case A using a report template B if it is not the case that A collection is completed
effects: Once I authorize report for an adverse event case A using a report template B, it is the case that A collection is completed
Once I authorize report for an adverse event case A using a report template B, it is not the case anymore that A is pending remediation

assign_specialty.description: assign a clinical specialty B to an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only assign a clinical specialty B to an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
effects: Once I assign a clinical specialty B to an adverse event case A, it is the case that A is related to the clinical specialty B
Once I assign a clinical specialty B to an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_specialty.description: release a clinical specialty B from an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical specialty B from an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is related to the clinical specialty B
effects: Once I release a clinical specialty B from an adverse event case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a clinical specialty B from an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that A is related to the clinical specialty B

assign_department.description: assign a clinical department B to an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only assign a clinical department B to an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
effects: Once I assign a clinical department B to an adverse event case A, it is the case that A is associated with the clinical department B
Once I assign a clinical department B to an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_department.description: release a clinical department B from an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only release a clinical department B from an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is associated with the clinical department B
effects: Once I release a clinical department B from an adverse event case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a clinical department B from an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that A is associated with the clinical department B

assign_technical_service.description: assign a technical service B to an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only assign a technical service B to an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
effects: Once I assign a technical service B to an adverse event case A, it is the case that A is associated with the technical service B
Once I assign a technical service B to an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_technical_service.description: release a technical service B from an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only release a technical service B from an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is associated with the technical service B
effects: Once I release a technical service B from an adverse event case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a technical service B from an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that A is associated with the technical service B

assign_external_agency.description: assign an external agency B to an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only assign an external agency B to an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is active and B is available and B is eligible for the case A
effects: Once I assign an external agency B to an adverse event case A, it is the case that A is associated with the external agency B
Once I assign an external agency B to an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_external_agency.description: release an external agency B from an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only release an external agency B from an adverse event case A if it is the case that A is associated with the external agency B
effects: Once I release an external agency B from an adverse event case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an external agency B from an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that A is associated with the external agency B

conduct_panel_review.description: conduct panel review for an adverse event case A with a review panel B related to a clinical specialty C in a clinical department D
preconditions: I can only conduct panel review for an adverse event case A with a review panel B related to a clinical specialty C in a clinical department D if it is the case that A is assigned and A is related to the clinical specialty C and A is associated with the clinical department D and panel available B and B is eligible for the case A

I can only conduct panel review for an adverse event case A with a review panel B related to a clinical specialty C in a clinical department D if it is not the case that the panel review for A is completed
effects: Once I conduct panel review for an adverse event case A with a review panel B related to a clinical specialty C in a clinical department D, it is the case that A is assigned to the review panel B and the panel review for A is completed
Once I conduct panel review for an adverse event case A with a review panel B related to a clinical specialty C in a clinical department D, it is not the case anymore that panel available B

conduct_technical_analysis.description: conduct technical analysis for an adverse event case A with a review panel B associated with a technical service C using a secure document bucket D
preconditions: I can only conduct technical analysis for an adverse event case A with a review panel B associated with a technical service C using a secure document bucket D if it is the case that A is assigned and A is associated with the technical service C and D is available and panel available B and B is eligible for the case A and D is eligible for the case A

I can only conduct technical analysis for an adverse event case A with a review panel B associated with a technical service C using a secure document bucket D if it is not the case that the panel review for A is completed
effects: Once I conduct technical analysis for an adverse event case A with a review panel B associated with a technical service C using a secure document bucket D, it is the case that A is assigned to the review panel B and the panel review for A is completed and the case A requires a follow up review and A is pending remediation

Once I conduct technical analysis for an adverse event case A with a review panel B associated with a technical service C using a secure document bucket D, it is not the case anymore that panel available B and it is not the case anymore that D is available

complete_multidisciplinary_review.description: complete multidisciplinary review for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B and associated with a clinical department C
preconditions: I can only complete multidisciplinary review for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B and associated with a clinical department C if it is the case that the panel review for A is completed and the case A requires a follow up review and A is related to the clinical specialty B and A is associated with the clinical department C
effects: Once I complete multidisciplinary review for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B and associated with a clinical department C, it is not the case anymore that the case A requires a follow up review and it is not the case anymore that A is pending remediation

request_quality_committee_authorization.description: request authorization from a quality committee D for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B and associated with a clinical department C
preconditions: I can only request authorization from a quality committee D for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B and associated with a clinical department C if it is the case that A collection is completed and the panel review for A is completed and A is related to the clinical specialty B and A is associated with the clinical department C and D is the oversight entity for the case A

I can only request authorization from a quality committee D for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B and associated with a clinical department C if it is not the case that A is pending remediation and it is not the case that authorization for A is granted
effects: Once I request authorization from a quality committee D for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B and associated with a clinical department C, it is the case that authorization for A is granted

request_safety_committee_authorization.description: request authorization from a safety committee D for an adverse event case A associated with a technical service B and an external agency C
preconditions: I can only request authorization from a safety committee D for an adverse event case A associated with a technical service B and an external agency C if it is the case that A collection is completed and the panel review for A is completed and A is associated with the technical service B and A is associated with the external agency C and D is the oversight entity for the case A

I can only request authorization from a safety committee D for an adverse event case A associated with a technical service B and an external agency C if it is not the case that authorization for A is granted
effects: Once I request authorization from a safety committee D for an adverse event case A associated with a technical service B and an external agency C, it is the case that authorization for A is granted and A is pending remediation

implement_remediation.description: implement remediation for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B in a clinical department C
preconditions: I can only implement remediation for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B in a clinical department C if it is the case that authorization for A is granted and A is pending remediation and A is related to the clinical specialty B and A is associated with the clinical department C
effects: Once I implement remediation for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B in a clinical department C, it is the case that A has been approved for remediation

Once I implement remediation for an adverse event case A related to a clinical specialty B in a clinical department C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending remediation and it is not the case anymore that A collection is completed and it is not the case anymore that the case A requires a follow up review

reopen_collection_and_collect.description: reopen collection and collect for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B with a collection technician C
preconditions: I can only reopen collection and collect for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B with a collection technician C if it is the case that A has been approved for remediation and authorization for A is granted and A is assigned and the evidence kit B is allocated to the case A and C is available
I can only reopen collection and collect for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B with a collection technician C if it is not the case that A collection is completed
effects: Once I reopen collection and collect for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B with a collection technician C, it is the case that A collection is completed

document_collection.description: document collection for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B
preconditions: I can only document collection for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B if it is the case that authorization for A is granted and A collection is completed and the evidence kit B is allocated to the case A
I can only document collection for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B if it is not the case that A is pending remediation and it is not the case that collection for A is documented
effects: Once I document collection for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B, it is the case that collection for A is documented

document_collection_via_channel.description: document collection for an adverse event case A via a notification channel B
preconditions: I can only document collection for an adverse event case A via a notification channel B if it is the case that authorization for A is granted and A collection is completed and B is available
I can only document collection for an adverse event case A via a notification channel B if it is not the case that A is pending remediation and it is not the case that collection for A is documented
effects: Once I document collection for an adverse event case A via a notification channel B, it is the case that collection for A is documented
Once I document collection for an adverse event case A via a notification channel B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

assign_report_template_to_case.description: assign a report template B to an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only assign a report template B to an adverse event case A if it is the case that collection for A is documented and B is available and the case A is compatible with the report template B
effects: Once I assign a report template B to an adverse event case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the case A
Once I assign a report template B to an adverse event case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

authorize_local_record_report.description: authorize an incoming report case A with a report template C for a local case record B
preconditions: I can only authorize an incoming report case A with a report template C for a local case record B if it is the case that A is active and the incoming report case flag is set for A and the case report template link for A is C and C is assigned to the case B
I can only authorize an incoming report case A with a report template C for a local case record B if it is not the case that the case report for A is authorized with C
effects: Once I authorize an incoming report case A with a report template C for a local case record B, it is the case that the case report for A is authorized with C

log_evidence_submission.description: log evidence submission for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B by a collection technician C
preconditions: I can only log evidence submission for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B by a collection technician C if it is the case that A is active and the incoming report case flag is set for A and A collection is completed and collection for A is documented and the evidence kit B is allocated to the case A and C is available
I can only log evidence submission for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B by a collection technician C if it is not the case that the evidence submission for A is logged
effects: Once I log evidence submission for an adverse event case A using an evidence kit B by a collection technician C, it is the case that the evidence submission for A is logged

finalize_internal_report.description: finalize internal report for an adverse event case A
preconditions: I can only finalize internal report for an adverse event case A if it is the case that the local case record flag is set for A and A is active and A is assigned and the panel review for A is completed and authorization for A is granted and collection for A is documented and A collection is completed
I can only finalize internal report for an adverse event case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize internal report for an adverse event case A, it is the case that A is closed

finalize_external_report_with_template.description: finalize external report for an adverse event case A using a report template B
preconditions: I can only finalize external report for an adverse event case A using a report template B if it is the case that the incoming report case flag is set for A and A is active and A is assigned and the panel review for A is completed and authorization for A is granted and collection for A is documented and A collection is completed and the case report for A is authorized with B
I can only finalize external report for an adverse event case A using a report template B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize external report for an adverse event case A using a report template B, it is the case that A is closed

finalize_external_report_with_submission.description: finalize external report for an adverse event case A with evidence submission
preconditions: I can only finalize external report for an adverse event case A with evidence submission if it is the case that the incoming report case flag is set for A and A is active and A is assigned and the panel review for A is completed and authorization for A is granted and collection for A is documented and A collection is completed and the evidence submission for A is logged
I can only finalize external report for an adverse event case A with evidence submission if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I finalize external report for an adverse event case A with evidence submission, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.assign_investigator: assign investigator {?investigator} to adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.release_investigator: release investigator {?investigator} from adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_evidence_kit: reserve evidence kit {?evidence_kit} for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.release_evidence_kit: release evidence kit {?evidence_kit} from adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}

action_nl_templates.authorize_report_via_template: authorize report for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using report template {?report_template}

action_nl_templates.release_specialty: release clinical specialty {?clinical_specialty} from adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_department: assign clinical department {?clinical_department} to adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.release_department: release clinical department {?clinical_department} from adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_technical_service: assign technical service {?technical_service} to adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.release_technical_service: release technical service {?technical_service} from adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.assign_external_agency: assign external agency {?external_agency} to adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.release_external_agency: release external agency {?external_agency} from adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.conduct_panel_review: conduct panel review for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} with review panel {?review_panel} related to clinical specialty {?clinical_specialty} in clinical department {?clinical_department}
action_nl_templates.conduct_technical_analysis: conduct technical analysis for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} with review panel {?review_panel} associated with technical service {?technical_service} using secure document bucket {?secure_document_bucket}
action_nl_templates.complete_multidisciplinary_review: complete multidisciplinary review for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} related to clinical specialty {?clinical_specialty} and associated with clinical department {?clinical_department}
action_nl_templates.request_quality_committee_authorization: request authorization from quality committee {?quality_committee} for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} related to clinical specialty {?clinical_specialty} and associated with clinical department {?clinical_department}
action_nl_templates.request_safety_committee_authorization: request authorization from safety committee {?safety_committee} for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} associated with technical service {?technical_service} and external agency {?external_agency}
action_nl_templates.implement_remediation: implement remediation for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} related to clinical specialty {?clinical_specialty} in clinical department {?clinical_department}
action_nl_templates.reopen_collection_and_collect: reopen collection and collect for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using evidence kit {?evidence_kit} with collection technician {?collection_technician}
action_nl_templates.document_collection: document collection for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using evidence kit {?evidence_kit}
action_nl_templates.document_collection_via_channel: document collection for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} via notification channel {?notification_channel}

action_nl_templates.log_evidence_submission: log evidence submission for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using evidence kit {?evidence_kit} by collection technician {?collection_technician}
action_nl_templates.finalize_internal_report: finalize internal report for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates.finalize_external_report_with_template: finalize external report for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using report template {?report_template}
action_nl_templates.finalize_external_report_with_submission: finalize external report for adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} with evidence submission

predicate_nl_templates.case_department: {?adverse_event_case} is associated with the clinical department {?clinical_department}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_investigator: release an investigator {?investigator} from an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_evidence_kit: reserve an evidence kit {?evidence_kit} for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_evidence_kit: release an evidence kit {?evidence_kit} from an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_collection: authorize collection for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using an evidence kit {?evidence_kit}
action_nl_templates_indef.trigger_notification_channel: trigger a notification channel {?notification_channel} for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.technician_collect_evidence: collect evidence for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using an evidence kit {?evidence_kit} by a collection technician {?collection_technician}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_report_via_template: authorize report for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using a report template {?report_template}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_specialty: assign a clinical specialty {?clinical_specialty} to an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_specialty: release a clinical specialty {?clinical_specialty} from an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_department: release a clinical department {?clinical_department} from an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_technical_service: assign a technical service {?technical_service} to an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_technical_service: release a technical service {?technical_service} from an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_external_agency: assign an external agency {?external_agency} to an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_external_agency: release an external agency {?external_agency} from an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.conduct_panel_review: conduct panel review for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} with a review panel {?review_panel} related to a clinical specialty {?clinical_specialty} in a clinical department {?clinical_department}
action_nl_templates_indef.conduct_technical_analysis: conduct technical analysis for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} with a review panel {?review_panel} associated with a technical service {?technical_service} using a secure document bucket {?secure_document_bucket}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_multidisciplinary_review: complete multidisciplinary review for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} related to a clinical specialty {?clinical_specialty} and associated with a clinical department {?clinical_department}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_quality_committee_authorization: request authorization from a quality committee {?quality_committee} for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} related to a clinical specialty {?clinical_specialty} and associated with a clinical department {?clinical_department}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_safety_committee_authorization: request authorization from a safety committee {?safety_committee} for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} associated with a technical service {?technical_service} and an external agency {?external_agency}

action_nl_templates_indef.reopen_collection_and_collect: reopen collection and collect for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using an evidence kit {?evidence_kit} with a collection technician {?collection_technician}
action_nl_templates_indef.document_collection: document collection for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using an evidence kit {?evidence_kit}
action_nl_templates_indef.document_collection_via_channel: document collection for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} via a notification channel {?notification_channel}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_report_template_to_case: assign a report template {?report_template} to an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_local_record_report: authorize an incoming report case {?incoming_report_source} with a report template {?report_template} for a local case record {?local_case_record}
action_nl_templates_indef.log_evidence_submission: log evidence submission for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using an evidence kit {?evidence_kit} by a collection technician {?collection_technician}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_internal_report: finalize internal report for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_external_report_with_template: finalize external report for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} using a report template {?report_template}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_external_report_with_submission: finalize external report for an adverse event case {?adverse_event_case} with evidence submission

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a adverse event case or a investigator or a review panel or a clinical department or a clinical specialty or a technical service or a evidence kit or a notification channel or a report template or a collection technician or a secure bucket or a external agency or a oversight entity is also a object
Everything that is a quality committee or a safety committee is also a oversight entity
Everything that is a local case record or a incoming report case is also a adverse event case
